signals.raw:
RAPTORS CLINCH 5TH SEED, WILL FACE CAVALIERS IN FIRST ROUND | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**

The **Toronto Raptors secured their first playoff berth in four years** on April 13, 2026, clinching the 5th seed in the Eastern Conference[2]. Scotty Barnes recorded a triple-double with 18 points, 8 rebounds, and 9 assists in a decisive 136-101 victory over the Brooklyn Nets[2].
